plugins.name: ops
plugins.description: Business operations command center for Claude Code — 60 skills, 21 agents, smart background daemon. Manage communications (WhatsApp/Email/Slack/Telegram), projects, infrastructure (AWS), revenue (Stripe+RevenueCat), e-commerce, marketing, monitoring (Datadog/New Relic/OTEL), voice, and smart home (Homey Pro). Includes /ops:ops-ar A&R (audio analysis + demo verdict cards), /gtm go-to-market planner, /ops:projects portfolio dashboard, /ops:ops-mac macOS diagnose-and-fix (macos-toolkit CLI suite), /ops:ops-home control surface, and YOLO autonomous mode with 4 parallel C-suite agents.
